title: bulbophyllum humile
intro: Bulbophyllum humile, also known as the "dwarf bulbophyllum" or "miniature orchid," is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family, characterized by its small, delicate flowers and compact growth habit. Traditionally, Bulbophyllum humile has been used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bulbophyllum humile are believed to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and may be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
